metadata.title: Banned and Challenged Books by Women Authors
metadata.description: A dataset of books by women authors that have been challenged or banned in U.S. schools, libraries, and public institutions. Data sourced primarily from the American Library Association (ALA) Office for Intellectual Freedom annual Top 10 lists (2001–2024), PEN America Book Ban Index, and documented challenge records.
sources: American Library Association (ALA) Frequently Challenged Books — ala.org/bbooks
ALA Top 10 Most Challenged Books Archive — ala.org/bbooks/frequentlychallengedbooks/top10/archive
PEN America Book Ban Index — pen.org/book-bans
ALA Office for Intellectual Freedom Blog — oif.ala.org
metadata.notes: years_challenged lists years the title appeared on the ALA Top 10 list and/or years of documented formal challenges. location reflects the most notable or documented challenge sites; many books faced challenges across dozens of districts. outcome reflects the most commonly documented result; individual challenge outcomes vary by district.

books.title: I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings
books.author: Maya Angelou
books.location: Alabama State Textbook Committee; California; Texas; Georgia; Virginia; Pennsylvania (multiple districts)
reason_for_challenge: depictions of rape and sexual abuse
books.outcome: Retained in most cases; removed or restricted in some districts. Has faced 39+ documented public challenges or bans since 1983.

books.title: The Bluest Eye
books.author: Toni Morrison
books.location: Wentzville, MO; Colton, CA; Polk County, FL; Pinellas County, FL; Rocky River, OH; Bedford County, VA; Spotsylvania County, VA
books.outcome: Removed in Wentzville, MO and Pinellas County, FL. Retained after review in Rocky River, OH and Colton, CA. Quarantined pending review in Polk County, FL. Ranked #34 most challenged 1990–1999, #15 for 2000–2009, #10 for 2010–2019.

books.title: Beloved
books.author: Toni Morrison
books.location: Louisville, KY (Eastern High School); Plymouth Canton, MI; Polk County, FL; Spotsylvania County, VA; Virginia State Senate
books.outcome: Removed from AP English curriculum in Louisville, KY; removed from all English curricula in Plymouth Canton, MI; quarantined in Polk County, FL; removed in Spotsylvania County, VA.

books.title: The Color Purple
books.author: Alice Walker
books.location: Oakland, CA; Newport News, VA; Souderton, PA; Morgantown, NC; Texas State Prisons; Clay County, FL
books.outcome: Retained after nine-month debate in Oakland, CA. Placed in restricted section (18+) in Newport News, VA (1986). Banned in Souderton, PA (1992). Permanently removed from Clay County, FL schools (January 2024). Banned from all Texas State Prisons (2017).

books.title: The Handmaid's Tale
books.author: Margaret Atwood
books.location: Judson, TX; Upper Moreland, PA; Guilford County, NC; Madison County, VA; Goddard, KS; Edmonton, Alberta, Canada
books.outcome: Superintendent's ban overturned in Judson, TX. Downgraded from required to optional in Upper Moreland, PA. Banned from high school libraries in Madison County, VA. Removed from 29 titles list in Goddard, KS (2021). Temporarily banned in Edmonton, Alberta; ban paused after public backlash.

books.title: Forever
books.author: Judy Blume
books.location: Multiple districts in Texas, Pennsylvania, Utah, Florida; Martin County, FL
books.outcome: Removed from Martin County, FL middle and high schools (2023). #7 most challenged book of the 1990s per ALA. Challenged across dozens of districts nationwide, removed in many.

books.title: Are You There God? It's Me, Margaret
books.author: Judy Blume
books.location: Gilbert, AZ; Tuscaloosa, AL; Zimmerman, MN; Katy Independent School District, TX
reason_for_challenge: religious content and questioning of God
books.outcome: Removed from elementary school libraries in Gilbert, AZ (1980). Challenged in Tuscaloosa, AL (1982). Required parental permission in Zimmerman, MN. Pulled from Katy ISD, TX elementary schools (2022).

books.title: Deenie
books.author: Judy Blume
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Removed or restricted in multiple school libraries and curricula.

books.title: Blubber
books.author: Judy Blume
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Removed or restricted in multiple school libraries.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.author: Harper Lee
books.location: Hanover County, VA (1966); Eden Valley, MN; Warren, IN; Waukegan, IL; Duluth, MN (2018)
books.outcome: School board reversed its removal decision in Hanover County, VA (1966) after public outcry and Lee's own criticism. Removed from Duluth, MN middle school curricula (2018). Challenged repeatedly but retained in most districts.

books.title: Speak
books.author: Laurie Halse Anderson
books.location: Republic, MO; Iowa (14 school districts under Senate File 496); Texas; Florida; Idaho; North Carolina; Pennsylvania; Tennessee
reason_for_challenge: depictions of rape and sexual assault
claimed to be biased against male students
books.outcome: Challenged as "soft pornography" in Republic, MO (2010). Banned in 14 Iowa school districts under Senate File 496; law temporarily blocked December 2023 by court order. Banned 14 times in 2022–2023 school year per PEN America.

books.title: Crank
books.author: Ellen Hopkins
books.location: Lehighton Area School District, PA; Rockwall ISD, TX; Flagler County, FL; Matanuska-Susitna Borough School District, AK; Buncombe County, NC
books.outcome: Removed from Rockwall ISD, TX without formal review process. Removed in Matanuska-Susitna Borough, AK. #9 most banned book of 2022–23 school year with 23 bans per PEN America. Between 2021–2023, Hopkins' 19 titles were banned 268 times across 68 districts.

books.title: Tricks
books.author: Ellen Hopkins
books.location: Buncombe County Schools, NC; Rockwall ISD, TX; Matanuska-Susitna Borough, AK; Lehighton Area School District, PA
books.outcome: Removed unanimously by Buncombe County Board of Education, NC. Removed in Rockwall ISD, TX and Matanuska-Susitna Borough, AK. #1 most banned book of 2022–23 school year with 33 bans per PEN America.

books.title: Glass
books.author: Ellen Hopkins
books.location: Multiple school districts in Texas, Pennsylvania, Alaska
books.outcome: Removed in multiple districts. Part of the 268 total bans of Hopkins' works across 68 districts between 2021–2023.

books.title: The Hate U Give
books.author: Angie Thomas
books.location: Katy ISD, TX; Edgerton Public Schools, MN; Collier County Public Schools, FL; Rankin County, MS
books.outcome: Reinstated with parental permission requirement in Katy ISD, TX after 4,000-signature student petition. Removed from freshman curriculum in Edgerton, MN (5-0 vote). Reinstated in Rankin County, MS after legal pressure.

books.title: Twilight series
books.author: Stephenie Meyer
books.location: Brockbank Junior High, Magna, UT; Austin Memorial Library, Cleveland, TX
books.outcome: Challenged at Brockbank Junior High, UT (2009). Challenged at Austin Memorial Library, TX for "occultic and demonic" content. Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2009 and 2010.

books.title: The Hunger Games trilogy
books.author: Suzanne Collins
books.location: Goffstown, NH; Missouri (middle school); multiple districts
books.outcome: Retained with warning label and moved to optional reading list in Missouri. Parent challenged book in Goffstown, NH claiming it gave children nightmares. Ranked #3 most challenged in 2011; #5 in 2016.

books.title: ttyl; ttfn; l8r, g8r series
books.author: Lauren Myracle
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: #1 most challenged book in 2009 and 2011 per ALA. Challenged widely across U.S. schools and libraries.

books.title: Alice series
books.author: Phyllis Reynolds Naylor
books.location: Multiple school districts and public libraries across the United States
books.outcome: #1 most challenged in 2003. Appeared on ALA Top 10 list seven consecutive years. Removed or restricted in multiple libraries.

books.title: Eleanor & Park
books.author: Rainbow Rowell
books.location: Anoka-Hennepin School District, MN
reason_for_challenge: depictions of domestic violence and poverty
books.outcome: Removed from Anoka-Hennepin School District, MN; Rowell's speaking invitation rescinded and disciplinary action sought against librarians who selected it.

books.title: Out of Darkness
books.author: Ashley Hope Perez
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Received 50 documented challenges in 2022 alone; ranked #9 on ALA's Top 13 Most Challenged Books of 2022. Removed in multiple districts.

books.title: A Court of Mist and Fury
books.author: Sarah J. Maas
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Ranked #10 on ALA's Top 13 Most Challenged Books of 2022. Removed from multiple school libraries.

books.title: This Book is Gay
books.author: Juno Dawson
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Banned, challenged, relocated, and restricted across multiple districts. Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2021, 2022, 2023, and 2024.

books.title: Drama
books.author: Raina Telgemeier
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2014, 2016, 2017, and 2018. Removed or restricted in multiple school libraries.

books.title: Gossip Girl series
books.author: Cecily von Ziegesar
books.location: Multiple school districts and public libraries across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2006, 2008, and 2011. Removed or restricted in multiple libraries.

books.title: What My Mother Doesn't Know
books.author: Sonya Sones
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list five times (2004, 2005, 2007, 2009, 2010). Removed or restricted in multiple school libraries.

books.title: Beyond Magenta: Transgender Teens Speak Out
books.author: Susan Kuklin
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2015, 2019, and 2021. Removed or restricted in multiple districts.

books.title: Sold
books.author: Patricia McCormick
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
reason_for_challenge: depictions of rape and human trafficking
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2022, 2023, and 2024. Removed from multiple school libraries.

books.title: The Earth, My Butt, and Other Big Round Things
books.author: Carolyn Mackler
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2006 and 2011. Removed or restricted in multiple school libraries.

books.title: My Sister's Keeper
books.author: Jodi Picoult
books.location: Multiple school districts and public libraries across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2009. Removed or restricted in some libraries.

books.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
books.author: E.L. James
books.location: Multiple public libraries across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2012, 2013, and 2015. Removed from some public library systems.

books.title: Persepolis
books.author: Marjane Satrapi
books.location: Chicago Public Schools, IL; multiple districts
books.outcome: Temporarily pulled from Chicago Public Schools 7th-grade curriculum and all district warehouses (2013) before being reinstated after public outcry. Ranked #2 on ALA Top 10 list in 2014.

books.title: Bridge to Terabithia
books.author: Katherine Paterson
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 lists in 2002 and 2003. Removed or restricted in some school libraries.

books.title: Roll of Thunder, Hear My Cry
books.author: Mildred D. Taylor
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2002. Challenged in multiple school districts.

books.title: Fun Home: A Family Tragicomic
books.author: Alison Bechdel
books.location: College of Charleston, SC; multiple college campuses and public libraries
books.outcome: SC state legislators threatened to cut funding to College of Charleston for including it in a summer reading program (2014). Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2015.

books.title: Nickel and Dimed: On (Not) Getting By in America
books.author: Barbara Ehrenreich
books.location: Multiple school districts and colleges across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2010. Challenged at multiple colleges where it was assigned as summer reading.

books.title: A Day in the Life of Marlon Bundo
books.author: Jill Twiss
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2018 and 2019. Removed or restricted in some school libraries.

books.title: This One Summer
books.author: Mariko Tamaki
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2016 and 2018. Removed or restricted in multiple school libraries.

books.title: Summer of My German Soldier
books.author: Bette Greene
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2001. Challenged in multiple school districts; retained in most cases.

books.title: Blood and Chocolate
books.author: Annette Curtis Klause
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2001. Removed or restricted in some school libraries.

books.title: A Bad Boy Can Be Good for a Girl
books.author: Tanya Lee Stone
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2013. Removed or restricted in some school libraries.

books.title: Lush
books.author: Natasha Friend
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2010. Challenged in some school libraries.

books.title: Nasreen's Secret School: A True Story from Afghanistan
books.author: Jeanette Winter
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2015. Challenged in some school libraries.

books.title: Something Happened in Our Town: A Child's Story About Racial Injustice
books.author: Marianne Celano, Marietta Collins, and Ann Hazzard
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2020. Removed or restricted in some school libraries.

books.title: Julie of the Wolves
books.author: Jean Craighead George
books.location: Multiple school districts across the United States
books.outcome: Appeared on ALA Top 10 list in 2002. Removed or restricted in some school libraries.
